milestone: Closed-loop neural inference pilot for cognitive state estimation
present_state_proof: Current validation demonstrates correlation between recorded neural signals and labeled task states under constrained laboratory conditions. Reproducibility confirmed on internal dataset only; no external replication yet.
falsifier: If correlation between neural signals and labeled task states fails to reproduce on independent dataset under identical protocol, the model is not admissible for scaling.

claims.text: Model identifies patterns in neural activity associated with predefined task states.
Observed correlations hold within controlled experimental dataset.
System may support limited inference of cognitive state under constrained conditions.
